Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: dressingwear & nightwear [300423761], dressing garments [300403911], costume by function [300212133], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Men's or women's loose, informal garments, often coat-like, worn when partly or fully undressed. Generally warm and often full-length; may be worn with a rope belt.

Source.Source_ID: 2000007861/Cunnington et al., Dictionary of English Costume (1965)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Prenda suelta e informal, que se lleva cuando se está parcial o completamente desnudo; por lo general, cálida; con frecuencia, larga hasta los pies de larga y con un cinturón.
Ruime, informele kleding die wordt gedragen wanneer men niet of slechts gedeeltelijk is gekleed, over het algemeen warm en vaak tot op de grond reikend, met een ceintuur van stof.
Lockeres, formloses Kleidungsstück, das getragen wird, wenn man teilweise oder ganz entkleidet ist; ist in der Regel warm, oft bodenlang und mit einem Gürtel.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.

Source.Source_ID: 2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)
